FSD.title: Full-Stack Web Development (MERN)
FSD.description: Master responsive frontend layouts, secure backend REST APIs, schema design, and production deployments.

tasks: Learn semantic HTML tags for maximum search engine SEO structure
Master absolute flexbox alignment and responsive CSS grid setups
Configure variable theme properties using premium CSS HSL design tokens

projects.Job: Deploy a premium interactive developer profile dashboard
projects.Freelancing: Design a gorgeous high-converting Landing Page for a local medical consultant in Figma & CSS
projects.Build Projects: Build a responsive retro arcade layout showcasing mini JavaScript canvas game elements

alternativeQuests: Create a clean hover state library with micro-animations
Audit a real-world local business homepage for responsive scroll leaks
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: A premium backend is completely useless if your landing page scroll overflows on mobile screens. Learn layout alignment first!

tasks: Master scope layers, closures, array callbacks, and prototype structures
Learn to interact cleanly with DOM nodes using asynchronous Fetch requests
Understand promises and resolve async/await try-catch patterns

projects.Job: Build an dynamic pricing calculator with client interest estimators
projects.Freelancing: Develop a customizable dynamic invoicing generator for clients
projects.Build Projects: Create a live currency tracker plotting real-time exchange visual graphs

alternativeQuests: Implement input debounce throttling on standard key search events
Write a script that caches fetch API responses in browser sessionStorage
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Stop copying. Write code line-by-line, open browser inspector, and understand exactly where variables reside in memory!

tasks: Understand component life-cycles, JSX renders, and prop drilling limits
Master primary useState, useEffect, and custom modular hook systems
Build high-performance controlled input fields with proper state loops

projects.Job: Deploy a collaborative Kanban card manager with category filters
projects.Freelancing: Build an booking reservation widget that connects directly to Calendly APIs
projects.Build Projects: Build a responsive typing speed tester calculating WPM in real-time

alternativeQuests: Create a dark-mode theme provider component using React Context API
Implement smooth drag-and-drop animations without using external packages
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: The useEffect dependency array is not a decoration. Understand when your component mounts and updates to prevent nasty infinite loops!

baseWeeks.topic: Advanced React State & Core Web Vitals Optimization
tasks: Optimize render frames using useMemo, useCallback, and React.memo references
Configure client-side routing modules with animated page loading flags
Analyze and resolve Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) on dynamic image loads

projects.Job: Create a multi-step user register onboarding panel with validation
projects.Freelancing: Design a portfolio gallery with lightning-fast image compression
projects.Build Projects: Create an aesthetic interactive audio wave player playing local tracks

alternativeQuests: Audit performance scores using Google Lighthouse and secure a 98+ mobile score
Build a custom lazy-loading image wrapper with blurred placeholders
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Don't over-optimize early! Write readable components first, benchmark bottlenecks, and then apply useMemo where needed.

tasks: Understand Libuv multi-threading pools, event loops, and non-blocking I/O
Build custom express controllers handling RESTful CRUD requests
Implement centralized request logging and error handling middleware

projects.Job: Create a protected student course registration API backend
projects.Freelancing: Build a customizable email outreach API for newsletter dispatch
projects.Build Projects: Build an image metadata parser server utilizing file system arrays

alternativeQuests: Write a security middleware protecting express headers using helmet configs
Implement rate-limiting layers capping IP requests to 100 per minute
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Node's single-threaded event loop is extremely powerful, but if you perform heavy CPU calculations on the main thread, the entire server freezes!

tasks: Design normalized vs denormalized document relational formats in MongoDB
Implement Mongoose compound indexing to optimize query execution times
Write secure Mongoose pre-save hooks hashing fields automatically

projects.Job: Design an e-commerce catalog DB schema with nested inventory lists
projects.Freelancing: Configure a dynamic landing page CMS engine writing inputs to MongoDB
projects.Build Projects: Build a secure note repository searching text entries with regex keys

alternativeQuests: Write a database seeding script generating 100 fake mock documents
Analyze query efficiency using MongoDB explain plans to locate collection scans
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Indexes are like book contents. Don't query without indexes, otherwise the database has to scan every single document which kills scale!

tasks: Build dual-token auth systems using Short-lived Access & Long-lived Refresh tokens
Store session identifiers inside secure HttpOnly, SameSite strict cookies
Set up axios dynamic interceptors handling 401 token refresh requests

projects.Job: Deploy an admin dashboard gate with role-based access control (RBAC)
projects.Freelancing: Build a client onboarding panel storing signed contract tokens
projects.Build Projects: Create a private collaborative document hub with custom access PINs

alternativeQuests: Integrate third-party social logins safely via secure callback routes
Implement password reset flows using secure email verification tokens
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Never, ever store JWT tokens inside localStorage! It exposes your user to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) session hijack attacks.

tasks: Configure Stripe payment intent APIs managing secure client checks
Build robust Express webhook routes handling completed purchase payloads
Implement automated emails sending PDF invoice templates on success

projects.Job: Build a checkout cart system updating nested stock levels in database
projects.Freelancing: Deploy a recurring monthly subscription SaaS billing gate for clients
projects.Build Projects: Design an active donations portal displaying live progress goal bars

alternativeQuests: Write unit tests verifying Stripe webhook session validation integrity
Create a dynamic cart drawer panel saving items across page reloads
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Webhook events are async. Always verify Stripe request signatures on the server before updating order statuses in the database!

DSA.title: Data Structures & Algorithms (DSA)
DSA.description: Master algorithmic problem solving, recursion, advanced data structures, and FAANG coding interviews.

tasks: Master Big O notation, worst-case, average-case, and amortized runtimes
Implement Two-Pointer techniques for optimal array operations
Understand Sliding Window patterns to handle subarray problems efficiently

projects.Job: Solve 10 LeetCode Easy array problems using Two-Pointer and Sliding Window
projects.Freelancing: Build an algorithmic visualization page for clients explaining search speed differences
projects.Build Projects: Build a visual sliding window visualization tool with customizable parameters

alternativeQuests: Create a clean complexity cheat sheet detailing all core datastructures
Optimize a nested loop O(N^2) algorithm to run in linear O(N) time
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Before coding, write out the brute force solution, calculate its time complexity, and then find constraints to optimize it!

tasks: Understand hash collisions and resolve them using separate chaining
Master anagram, palindrome, and substring search patterns
Implement character frequency map algorithms in O(N) time complexity

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode Mediums: Group Anagrams and Longest Substring Without Repeating Chars
projects.Freelancing: Create an automated client domain checker checking availability with fast hashmaps
projects.Build Projects: Create an interactive typographic analyzer parsing file keywords instantly

alternativeQuests: Write a custom hashmap implementation from scratch using JS arrays
Optimize a search feature to leverage O(1) lookups instead of O(N) loop scans
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: When you need to count frequencies or find duplicates, your absolute best friend is a Hash Map. It turns O(N^2) checks into O(N)!

tasks: Understand recursive call stacks, base cases, and stack overflow errors
Implement classic subset generation and permutation patterns
Solve standard backtracking challenges using decision trees

projects.Job: Solve classic N-Queens, Sudoku Solver, and Permutations on LeetCode
projects.Freelancing: Develop an automated task schedule builder testing all path combinations
projects.Build Projects: Build a visual Maze Generator & Solver illustrating recursive backtracking

alternativeQuests: Draw a complete recursion call stack tree on paper for a Fibonacci sequence
Write a recursive utility function deep-cloning complex nested objects
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Recursion is simple: find the base case, solve the smallest subproblem, and trust the recursive leap. Always draw the tree on paper!

tasks: Implement Singly and Doubly Linked Lists and node structures
Master Floyd's Cycle Detection algorithm (Tortoise & Hare)
Practice in-place reversal of singly linked list structures

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode: Reverse Linked List and Linked List Cycle II
projects.Freelancing: Design a client change-history logging system using list structures
projects.Build Projects: Build an interactive visualizer illustrating linked list insertions & removals

alternativeQuests: Implement a stack using a Linked List structure under the hood
Reverse a linked list iteratively and recursively, comparing call stack usage
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Linked lists are all about pointer references. Draw nodes as boxes on paper, draw arrows, and update references step-by-step!

tasks: Understand LIFO/FIFO mechanics using basic array implementations
Master Balanced Parentheses parsing patterns using stack buffers
Implement Monotonic Stack patterns for next greater element challenges

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode: Valid Parentheses, Min Stack, and Next Greater Element
projects.Freelancing: Create an automated queue dispatcher managing client task priority orders
projects.Build Projects: Build an interactive expression solver converting standard formulas to postfix

alternativeQuests: Implement a queue using two stacks and analyze its amortized time efficiency
Write a real-time event logging queue that processes up to 10 events asynchronously
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Whenever a problem asks you to check matched pairs (like HTML tags or brackets) or search for nearest values, think Stack!

tasks: Implement Binary Search Tree structures with search, insert, and delete
Master Pre-order, In-order, and Post-order recursive DFS traversals
Implement Level-Order traversal using BFS and double-ended queues

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree and Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
projects.Freelancing: Build an interactive organizational chart tree builder for client company setups
projects.Build Projects: Build a visual Binary Search Tree sandbox illustrating real-time inserts/searches

alternativeQuests: Find the lowest common ancestor of two nodes inside a binary tree structure
Write a function checking if a binary tree is perfectly balanced or symmetrical
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Recursion rules tree traversals. Level-order BFS uses a queue, while deep DFS uses a stack. Never confuse the two!

baseWeeks.topic: Graphs, BFS, DFS & Shortest Path Algorithms
tasks: Represent graphs using adjacency lists and matrix formats
Implement Graph DFS/BFS traversals managing cycle visited sets
Understand Dijkstra's algorithm for shortest paths in weighted graphs

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode: Number of Islands, Clone Graph, and Course Schedule
projects.Freelancing: Create a delivery cost estimator network mapping coordinate hops
projects.Build Projects: Build an interactive visual pathfinder finding shortest paths around maze barriers

alternativeQuests: Detect a cycle in a directed graph using Kahn's topological sort algorithm
Implement Kruskal's algorithm to calculate the Minimum Spanning Tree of a network
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Graphs model real-world relationships. Master adjacency list representations first, as they are used in 95% of graph interview questions!

tasks: Understand overlapping subproblems and optimal substructures
Master Top-Down Memoization using recursion and result cache maps
Master Bottom-Up Tabulation using DP arrays and iterative loops

projects.Job: Solve LeetCode: Climbing Stairs, Coin Change, and Longest Common Subsequence
projects.Freelancing: Deploy an automated budget optimizer maximizing client project choices
projects.Build Projects: Build a knapsack problem sandbox visualizer showing DP matrix fills

alternativeQuests: Optimize a recursive Fibonacci algorithm from O(2^N) to O(N) using a simple cache
Solve the classic LeetCode House Robber problem using both memoization and tabulation
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Don't panic when you hear DP. It's just recursion with a dictionary to save computed results so you don't solve the same thing twice!

GenAI.title: Generative AI (GenAI) & LLM Engineering
GenAI.description: Master LLM API configurations, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector embeddings, agentic loops, and scaling AI apps.

baseWeeks.topic: Foundations of LLMs & Advanced Prompt Engineering
tasks: Understand Transformer architectures, tokens, attention, and weights
Master Zero-shot, Few-shot, and Chain-of-Thought prompt configurations
Implement prompt guardrails preventing injection attacks

projects.Job: Build an automated code auditor parsing security gaps in files via prompt sheets
projects.Freelancing: Develop a high-converting cold email template builder optimized for sales copy
projects.Build Projects: Create an interactive role-playing AI chat advisor with persistent personalities

alternativeQuests: Build a tool counting token expenses using OpenAI tiktoken parser libraries
Implement prompt templates utilizing secure HSL layout variables
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Generative AI is all about prompt precision. Think of the LLM as a highly capable junior engineer: give clear context, constraints, and examples!

tasks: Connect express backend routes to secure OpenAI / Anthropic SDK endpoints
Configure temperature, top_p, and frequency penalty variables
Implement real-time streamed text responses using Server-Sent Events (SSE)

projects.Job: Deploy an AI coding sandbox streaming bug fixes live to the editor screen
projects.Freelancing: Create an automated content copy generator for social media agency feeds
projects.Build Projects: Build a real-time creative storyteller streaming fictional paragraphs as users type

alternativeQuests: Write a robust retry system handling rate-limit API failures with exponential backoff
Create a clean frontend loading progress indicator keeping chat UI fully non-blocking
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Server response times for GenAI can exceed 5 seconds. Always stream your completions to keep the user experience responsive and lag-free!

tasks: Convert text strings into numerical high-dimensional vector representations
Master mathematical distance formulas (Cosine Similarity, Euclidean Distance)
Query vector vectors dynamically within local arrays or memory tables

projects.Job: Build a dynamic duplicate-ticket finder searching issue backlogs semantically
projects.Freelancing: Design an automated FAQ responder answering questions from clients
projects.Build Projects: Build a semantic search engine matching user queries to book quotes

alternativeQuests: Compare search speeds of exact string match vs vector cosine searches
Create an interactive visual canvas plotting words based on semantic distance
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Vector embeddings translate human meanings into mathematical numbers. Similar concepts will sit close together in vector space!

tasks: Set up Pinecone, ChromaDB, or pgvector cloud databases
Implement dynamic document chunking strategies (Overlapping, semantic splittings)
Build complete RAG routes retrieving verified documents to ground LLM responses

projects.Job: Build a secure corporate document parser querying internal SOP guidelines
projects.Freelancing: Develop a custom customer-support chatbot trained on a client's website documentation
projects.Build Projects: Create an interactive academic study assistant summarizing notes from textbooks

alternativeQuests: Implement a cache layer storing semantic queries to reduce vector DB API bills
Build an automated data scraper chunking HTML websites into format vectors
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: LLMs hallucinate when they lack real-time context. RAG solves this: fetch relevant pages first, and force the LLM to ground its answer there!

baseWeeks.topic: Autonomous AI Agents & Tool Calling Pipelines
tasks: Understand agentic workflow loops: Action, Observation, Reflection
Configure function-calling schemas exposing local APIs to LLMs
Build state management modules controlling recursive agent execution limits

projects.Job: Deploy an AI SQL Analyst executing database queries safely based on client voice files
projects.Freelancing: Build an automated CRM assistant updating customer statuses from email parsing
projects.Build Projects: Build a multi-agent research reporter compiling full-length summaries from search APIs

alternativeQuests: Implement a circuit-breaker stopping recursive loops if the agent exceeds 5 cycles
Write standard unit tests verifying function-call argument validations
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: AI Agents can call custom tools! Expose your backend APIs as tools, and let the LLM decide which one to run to solve a complex goal.

tasks: Master LangChain chains, memory buffers, and prompt templates
Configure complex data ingestion pipelines utilizing LlamaIndex connectors
Build stateful conversation logs maintaining dynamic chat memories

projects.Job: Build a complex multi-file codebase reviewer analyzing code folders
projects.Freelancing: Create an automated CRM intake funnel qualifying and scoring leads
projects.Build Projects: Deploy a multi-room debate simulator where multiple AI agents argue topics

alternativeQuests: Optimize memory usage by utilizing window buffers storing only the last 5 turns
Implement custom data loader components processing raw CSV tables into RAG engines
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Frameworks like LangChain simplify setup, but don't treat them as black boxes. Understand under-the-hood API calls so you can debug them!

tasks: Understand structural differences: RAG vs fine-tuning adapted weights
Create formatted JSONL training datasets for specialized API tuning
Evaluate LLM output accuracy using benchmarks and LLM-as-a-judge

projects.Job: Prepare a fine-tuned model executing exact system-architect design logs
projects.Freelancing: Develop a fine-tuned copywriter model speaking in a client's brand voice
projects.Build Projects: Train an AI coding assistant outputting syntactically perfect CSS variables

alternativeQuests: Write a script checking training data for syntax anomalies or empty keys
Compare completions of fine-tuned engines against standard zero-shot models
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Fine-tuning modifies model weights to adapt tone and style. RAG imports factual knowledge. For 90% of business apps, RAG is what you need first!

tasks: Set up token caching, prompt compression, and load balancing configurations
Manage rate limiting and API bill management safeguards in production
Deploy secure, fully authenticated GenAI platforms live to CDNs

projects.Job: Deploy a high-scale chat assistant supporting authenticated student users
projects.Freelancing: Hand over a secure, self-hosted corporate AI tool under client domains
projects.Build Projects: Launch an AI SaaS generator integrating dynamic billing gateways

alternativeQuests: Implement custom analytics monitors recording token usage per user query
Write integration tests simulating multi-client concurrent streaming payloads
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: API calls to OpenAI or Anthropic get expensive fast. Implement database caching for common requests to protect your wallet!

DataAnalytics.title: Data Analytics Specialization
DataAnalytics.description: Master clean data ingestion, SQL query formulation, dashboard visual models, and business analysis metrics.

tasks: Learn Excel formulas, functions, lookup techniques (VLOOKUP, XLOOKUP, INDEX/MATCH)
Master data cleaning, handling missing values, and formatting types
Implement basic statistical formulas (mean, median, standard deviation)

projects.Job: Prepare a clean business cohort client report with lookup tables
projects.Freelancing: Build an interactive automated invoice reconciler sheet for clients
projects.Build Projects: Build a personal budget tracker sheet using clean Excel formatting tools

alternativeQuests: Create standard data hygiene checklist for analytics files
Audit a messy CSV file for empty rows and mismatched data formats
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Over 80% of data analytics tasks start with messy spreadsheets. Excel is still the most widely used tool on Earth — master its formulas first!

tasks: Create interactive pivot tables and pivot charts with slicers
Perform regression and trendline analysis within Excel Toolpak
Learn nesting conditional formats for visual hierarchy

projects.Job: Construct a dynamic sales performance dashboard with slicer controls
projects.Freelancing: Design a client inventory tracker reporting dynamic stock alarms
projects.Build Projects: Build a tracking board monitoring personal investments

alternativeQuests: Build a multi-tab business spreadsheet linking dynamic source tables
Perform standard outlier detection using boxplot visualizations
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: A great dashboard tells a story. Keep color themes simple, place KPIs at the top-left, and ensure filters are clear and intuitive.

tasks: Master SQL SELECT, WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT query clauses
Understand relational database designs and primary/foreign key connections
Formulate multi-table JOINs (INNER, LEFT, RIGHT, FULL OUTER)

projects.Job: Query enterprise database sets to build customer segment listings
projects.Freelancing: Formulate reporting SQL queries extraction scripts for a client store
projects.Build Projects: Design a relational schema for a digital bookstore catalogue

alternativeQuests: Write SQL query counting aggregate orders by customer city index
Compare query execution speeds between different JOIN methodologies
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: SQL is the lifeblood of data. Focus on understanding how JOINs work in memory before trying to write complex subqueries.

tasks: Write advanced window functions (ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LEAD/LAG)
Optimize query performance utilizing database indexes and explain plans
Construct Common Table Expressions (CTEs) for readable SQL structures

projects.Job: Build an analytical report identifying month-over-month revenue change rates
projects.Freelancing: Create an automated reporting script executing slow-query checks
projects.Build Projects: Create a database dashboard showing top-performing products

alternativeQuests: Optimize a query by replacing nested subqueries with readable CTEs
Write a transaction block ensuring safe database updates
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Window functions let you compare rows without complex self-joins. Master them and you will stand out in technical interviews!

tasks: Learn Tableau canvas layouts, dimension/measure definitions, and hierarchies
Build interactive chart cards (scatter plots, heatmaps, dual-axis charts)
Design visual storytelling dashboards with filters and highlight actions

projects.Job: Deliver an interactive regional sales dashboard showing profit margins
projects.Freelancing: Configure a hosted dashboard for a client tracking active users
projects.Build Projects: Build a public dashboard visualizing public transport metrics

alternativeQuests: Apply custom color palettes matching brand guidelines inside Tableau dashboards
Implement a dashboard action navigating users between overview and detail sheets
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Avoid clutter. Too many charts on a single dashboard confuse decision makers. Focus on 3-4 key metrics per page.

tasks: Import and transform data using Power Query Editor structures
Build star schemas and model table relationships inside PowerBI
Write DAX formulas (CALCULATE, RELATED, DIVIDE, time intelligence)

projects.Job: Build a financial performance dashboard tracking margins and dynamic KPIs
projects.Freelancing: Deploy a hosted PowerBI reporting suite tracking customer retention
projects.Build Projects: Design a sports analytics board tracking athletic statistics

alternativeQuests: Create custom calendar date table using DAX for time intelligence
Configure conditional column formats in Power Query using custom M-code
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: DAX calculations are calculated within context. Master how row context and filter context interact to avoid mathematical errors.

tasks: Learn Pandas DataFrames, Series, indexings, and query filtering
Perform data aggregations, groupings, and merging using Pandas
Plot visual charts using Matplotlib and Seaborn libraries

projects.Job: Write a Python script cleaning a database csv export dataset
projects.Freelancing: Develop a lightweight reporting pipeline parsing client Excel folders
projects.Build Projects: Build a python script plotting temperature changes over time

alternativeQuests: Analyze a DataFrame for missing values and fill them with median averages
Write a Python script calling a public weather API and saving results to CSV
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Python takes your analytics further. Use Pandas for massive files where Excel starts lagging or crashing.

tasks: Translate mathematical findings into actionable executive presentations
Build full-stack data pipeline from SQL extraction to visual slides
Prepare dynamic presentation decks containing verified data insights

projects.Job: Present a business proposal to solve logistics bottlenecks using data models
projects.Freelancing: Deliver a detailed business KPI overview audit for a client
projects.Build Projects: Publish a comprehensive Medium article analyzing global energy usage

alternativeQuests: Record a 5-minute video presentation explaining a dataset's core insights
Conduct a peer review on a dashboard layout highlighting visual improvements
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Technical skills are worthless if you cannot explain the business impact of your findings. Learn to present clearly to non-tech managers!

DataScience.title: Machine Learning & Data Science
DataScience.description: Master exploratory data structures, regression pipelines, neural networks, PyTorch, and deploying models to production.

tasks: Master Pandas, Numpy, and Seaborn for Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
Identify and handle outliers, skewness, and missing feature values
Perform feature scaling (Standardization, MinMax Normalization)

projects.Job: Create a comprehensive EDA notebook analyzing customer churn datasets
projects.Freelancing: Audit client sales history data and extract core feature distributions
projects.Build Projects: Build an interactive EDA dashboard plotting distributions using Streamlit

alternativeQuests: Apply logarithmic transformations to highly skewed numerical features
Write a custom pipeline handling categorical values using one-hot encoding
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Garbage in, garbage out! The best machine learning model is useless if trained on poorly preprocessed data. Spend time on EDA!

tasks: Understand vector spaces, matrices, dot products, and eigenvalues
Master probability distributions, Central Limit Theorem, and hypothesis testing
Understand correlation coefficients and covariance matrices

projects.Job: Perform A/B test analysis proving statistical significance of a landing page change
projects.Freelancing: Build an automated client analytics report proving marketing growth margins
projects.Build Projects: Write a statistics calculator from scratch using pure python functions

alternativeQuests: Write a python script calculating p-values for custom sample metrics
Calculate the cosine similarity between two dimensional vectors by hand
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Machine learning is just applied statistics. Don't skip the math, otherwise you won't understand *why* your model is misbehaving.

tasks: Understand Linear Regression, Gradient Descent optimization, and cost functions
Master Logistic Regression, Sigmoid activations, and decision boundaries
Evaluate classifiers using Confusion Matrices, Precision, Recall, and F1-Scores

projects.Job: Build a real-estate pricing estimator model using Scikit-Learn regression
projects.Freelancing: Develop a credit-card fraud detection classifier for a client portal
projects.Build Projects: Train an email spam classifier classifying text messages

alternativeQuests: Implement Linear Regression gradient descent updates from scratch in Python
Plot ROC-AUC curves comparing multiple classification model parameters
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Always look at F1-score or Precision/Recall for imbalanced datasets. Accuracy is highly misleading when fraud occurs only 0.1% of the time!

tasks: Understand Bagging (Random Forest) vs Boosting (XGBoost, LightGBM) concepts
Master hyperparameters: learning rate, tree depth, and regularization
Perform Grid Search and Random Search optimization loops

projects.Job: Train a high-performance XGBoost model predicting customer subscription churn
projects.Freelancing: Construct an inventory estimator model optimizing warehouse restocking schedules
projects.Build Projects: Compare performance margins of Random Forest vs XGBoost on housing datasets

alternativeQuests: Calculate feature importance metrics from an ensemble forest classifier
Configure cross-validation folds preventing model overfitting
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Hyperparameter tuning can lead to minor improvements, but feature engineering (combining or refining columns) is what yields major gains!

tasks: Master K-Means clustering and select optimal K using the Elbow method
Understand Principal Component Analysis (PCA) mathematical dimensions
Learn t-SNE visualization models for high-dimensional structures

projects.Job: Perform customer segmentation grouping users into marketing cohorts
projects.Freelancing: Build an anomaly detector finding outlier log lines for a server client
projects.Build Projects: Visualize 100-dimensional datasets in 2D using PCA coordinates

alternativeQuests: Calculate silhouette score coefficients for K-Means clusters
Write a python script projecting high-dimensional arrays onto principal component axes
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Unsupervised learning requires no labels. Use clustering to find hidden patterns in customer behaviors that you didn't even know existed.

tasks: Understand tensor operations, GPU acceleration, and computational graphs
Build Multi-Layer Perceptrons (MLPs) using PyTorch nn.Module templates
Master forward pass calculations, Loss functions, and backward propagations

projects.Job: Build a PyTorch network predicting loan approvals from applicant vectors
projects.Freelancing: Develop a lightweight rating estimation neural net for product listings
projects.Build Projects: Build a handwriting digits classifier (MNIST) using PyTorch

alternativeQuests: Write a custom training loop with optimizer steps and epoch validations
Analyze activation function differences (ReLU, Sigmoid, Tanh) on training loss
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: PyTorch is the industry gold standard for AI research. Keep your tensors clean and always monitor your loss gradients during training!

tasks: Understand convolutions, pooling, stride, and padding operations
Master Transfer Learning workflows using pre-trained ResNet/VGG weights
Perform image augmentation transformations preventing model overfitting

projects.Job: Train a medical scanner finding abnormalities in chest scans using ResNet
projects.Freelancing: Build a custom product-image classification pipeline for an online store client
projects.Build Projects: Deploy a cat-vs-dog image classifier trained on custom photos

alternativeQuests: Analyze convolution activation maps to visualize what features the network detects
Tune learning rate schedulers to stabilize deep network training cycles
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Don't train deep models from scratch unless you have massive datasets and computing resources. Always use transfer learning!

tasks: Export models using ONNX or serialization (Joblib/Pickle) systems
Build web server microservices around models using FastAPI/Flask
Deploy model endpoints containerized with Docker to cloud runtimes

projects.Job: Deploy an active FastAPI server serving real-time predictions with verification schemas
projects.Freelancing: Hand over a self-contained prediction Docker stack to a client
projects.Build Projects: Launch a live website predicting stock prices based on CSV uploads

alternativeQuests: Write unit tests verifying input schema validation on the fastapi prediction route
Configure simple prometheus logging tracking average prediction latencies
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: A model that only runs on your local Jupyter Notebook provides zero value to the company. Master API deployments first!

CyberSecurity.title: Advanced Cyber Security & SecOps
CyberSecurity.description: Master network protocols, penetration testing tools, OWASP vulnerabilities, threat hunting, and infrastructure protection.

tasks: Master TCP/IP, OSI model layers, routing, subnetting, and DNS systems
Learn Linux terminal commands, file permissions, and bash scripting
Analyze network traffic packets using Wireshark filters

projects.Job: Conduct a port scan and network topology analysis on a lab network
projects.Freelancing: Write a bash automation script auditing user permissions for client hosts
projects.Build Projects: Write a lightweight network port scanner in python

alternativeQuests: Capture and decrypt HTTP authentication headers on a test local network
Configure custom firewall routing policies inside a Linux sandbox environment
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: You cannot defend what you don't understand. Networking is the foundation of cybersecurity. Learn how packets move first!

tasks: Master active scanning techniques using Nmap, Masscan, and Gobuster
Understand Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) tools and frameworks
Analyze target subdomains and active service banners

projects.Job: Perform a comprehensive security audit report on a target testing website
projects.Freelancing: Audit external security vulnerabilities of a client company's public servers
projects.Build Projects: Build a subdomain scanner checking certificate transparency logs

alternativeQuests: Identify out-of-date service versions running on standard port services
Audit metadata leaks in public PDF files hosted on a company site
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Scanning is the phase where you find target entry points. Be thorough and verify all scan results before attempting exploits.

tasks: Master SQL Injection (SQLi) types and parameterization protections
Understand Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) models and sanitization rules
Analyze Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) and secure cookie tokens

projects.Job: Audit a vulnerable web application, listing all OWASP Top 10 bugs
projects.Freelancing: Secure a client's website contact forms from malicious injection payloads
projects.Build Projects: Build an interactive web playground illustrating XSS impacts

alternativeQuests: Exploit a local SQL injection vulnerability to retrieve database users
Implement content security policy (CSP) headers protecting a site from XSS
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Web security is essential. Secure your input forms, sanitize your HTML outputs, and always use HTTPOnly cookies to protect session tokens!

tasks: Configure Metasploit framework for penetration testing workflows
Understand exploit payloads, reverse shells, and bind shells
Identify and perform basic local privilege escalation checks

projects.Job: Exploit a vulnerable Windows/Linux server in a safe test lab environment
projects.Freelancing: Conduct a vulnerability assessment for a client's internal host systems

alternativeQuests: Migrate active process tokens to escalate user status to SYSTEM inside Windows
Evade basic antivirus detection by encoding custom payload signatures
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Penetration testing is about finding paths, not breaking things. Always document your steps and maintain strict legal authorization boundaries!

tasks: Understand Symmetric (AES) vs Asymmetric (RSA) encryption models
Configure SSL/TLS protocols and audit secure certificate configurations
Implement public key infrastructure (PKI) systems for secure server logins

projects.Freelancing: Set up end-to-end file encryption pipelines for client databases
projects.Build Projects: Build an encrypted local chat app encrypting packets with RSA

alternativeQuests: Verify cryptographic signatures on file downloads using sha256 checksums
Decrypt and audit expired TLS certificates on public web domains
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Never roll your own crypto! Always use standard, proven cryptographic libraries like OpenSSL or Sodium to encrypt data.

Audit server security logs for active brute-force login attempts

projects.Freelancing: Configure automated security event alarms for client servers
projects.Build Projects: Build a custom log analyzer alerting on recursive login failures

Deploy a honeypot server logging automated hacker scans
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Defensive security is just as important as offensive. Master log analysis, as it is the primary way teams detect active breaches in production!

tasks: Audit IAM access roles inside AWS/GCP to enforce least privilege
Configure secure Virtual Private Clouds (VPCs) and subnet route tables
Scan Docker container images for known security vulnerabilities

alternativeQuests: Build custom IAM rules limiting access to a specific S3 data bucket

baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Cloud security is all about isolation. Never expose database ports to the public web, and always limit access permissions!

Perform digital forensics tracking file access and memory logs

projects.Freelancing: Develop an Incident Response plan booklet for a client business
projects.Build Projects: Deploy a sandboxed malware visualization portal showing process hooks

alternativeQuests: Extract active indicators of compromise (IOCs) from a compromised host system
Perform a memory dump audit of a running process using forensic tools
baseWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: When a breach happens, remaining calm is key. Follow your incident response steps, preserve evidence, and focus on containment first!

globalTips: Adfar's Pro Tip: Solve the problem on paper first. If you can explain it to a 10-year-old child, you can code it easily!
Adfar's Pro Tip: Focus heavily on hands-on building. Building 1 real-world landing page is better than watching 50 hours of theoretical video courses!
Adfar's Pro Tip: Write clean code, maintain structured indentations, and document your Git commits. Bad habits early lead to broken servers later!
Adfar's Pro Tip: A premium software engineer is a problem solver first. Technology is just a tool; understand the core business problem you are solving!
Adfar's Pro Tip: Don't compare your Chapter 1 to someone else's Chapter 20. Consistent daily execution is what builds masters!

extraAdvancedWeeks.topic: System Design, Load Balancing & High Scale
tasks: Master horizontal scaling, load balancing algorithms, and reverse proxies
Implement high-performance distributed queues using RabbitMQ or BullMQ
Benchmark caching layer hits utilizing clustered Redis nodes

projects.Job: Architect a multi-region highly available microservices gateway
projects.Freelancing: Deliver a complete scaling consultation blueprint detailing client server bottlenecks
projects.Build Projects: Build a custom reverse proxy in Node balancing concurrent workloads

alternativeQuests: Dockerize container stacks and deploy automated Kubernetes nodes
Measure latency overhead of multiple gateway hops using tracing headers
extraAdvancedWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Real scale means designing for failure. If your database crashes, does your user get a clean placeholder page or a raw crash error? Plan for failure!

tasks: Migrate monolith routes into secure containerized microservices

Configure OpenTelemetry tracing with Prometheus and Grafana dashboards

projects.Freelancing: Audit enterprise systems and configure automated performance metrics alerts
projects.Build Projects: Build a distributed chat service broadcasting updates across isolated servers

alternativeQuests: Write custom protobuf schemas defining secure student verification payloads
Optimize memory allocations in microservices to reduce cold start boot times
extraAdvancedWeeks.adfarTip: Adfar Sir's Pro Tip: Microservices introduce complexity. Don't build microservices unless your team size or scaling needs absolutely demand them. A robust monolith is highly underrated!
